title: Butterfly fairy 小蝴蝶
description: The Post-calabash brother story of butterfly fairy character/“葫芦小金刚”故事后续的小蝴蝶
body:
小蝴蝶模组反馈QQ群：706834384.

Dependence: Butterfly addon(in additional file), geckolib, pekuhi, yes-steve-model

前置模组：小蝴蝶附属（在附加文件里面）,geckolib, pehuki, yes-steve-model

Character model need installed, otherwise game will crash

小蝴蝶模型需要安装，不然游戏会崩溃

Hotkey P to turn on or turn off this mode

热键P可以关闭或者开启这个模组

**main mod**

and

**Addon**

![Butterfly Sprite xiaohudie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd18d5b16872e5d2a64b04dc88dd7483862746b6.png)
**character model in additional file**
![auto defense](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f4b8797546bd5e551d99746d770ee5a6f749bb8.jpeg)

![a](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6515deed62264e358b8896d3f80bdf0777fcd537.jpeg)
/gamerule debug:这个命令是作者使用的，玩家不能使用
unzip and take four internal file to here

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/ADiYSOr78Xo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**角色模型在模组下面的附加文件，你可以在那边找到它们**

**注意：你必须要安装四个模型否则动画会不完整。**

TAB:charging power tab：蓄力

c:shield/护盾

ReleaseTAB:punch/flying kick attack 松开tab：飞踢/拳击

space:double jump 空格：二段跳

ctrl:butterfly flying ctrl：蝴蝶飞行

R:use kill/使用技能

G:changeskill G：切换技能

c:inverse change skill C:反向切换技能

B:randomize skill change  B:随机技能

Q:activate or deactivate whitelist killing Q：启动/关闭白名单击杀

K：kill all entity(not recommended) K:击杀一切生物（不推荐）

B:inversed skill change/B键反向切换技能

shift:defense shift：防御

/gamerule mobGrifing: enable or disable block destroy. 开关破坏方块

/gamerule xiaohudie pvp: enable or disable player damage. 开启玩家pvp

easy mode:25% original damage to player, normal mode 50%, hard mode 100%

简单模式对玩家造成25%伤害，普通模式50%，困难难度100%

/gamerule bounce true block entity being damaged at the backside of block 方块攻击反弹，方块伤害遮挡

properity of butterfly fairy in post-calabash brother story which translate to minecraft and valued by onepiece and jjk mod: strength 20, resistance 4, 237 health, double jump and highspeed movement, butterfly flying ability.

,小蝴蝶在葫芦娃后续故事的属性：力量20，抗性4,237生命值，二段跳和高速移动，蝴蝶飞行能力

1:lightattack damage 30 damage 轻击：30 伤害, resistance penetration: neglegible，抗性击穿：可忽视

2:charing attack damage 80-150 damage 蓄力攻击80-150 伤害 resistance penetration: medium，抗性击穿：中

3：dash attack/ spiraial kick 95-160 damage  回旋踢/冲击 95-160 伤害 resistance penetration: medium，抗性击穿：中

4：tracer bullet 54-67 damage 曳光弹 54-67伤害 resistance penetration: low，抗性击穿：低

5：heaven strike 388-436 damage 闪天击 388-436伤害 resistance penetration: fatal，抗性击穿：致命的

6：energy surge 310-360 damage 凝能冲击 310-360伤害 resistance penetration: critical，抗性击穿：非常高

7:magicspear 78+ damage 幻影之矛 78+伤害resistance penetration: medium，抗性击穿：中

8：photonblade 260+ damage 聚能光刀 260-308伤害 resistance penetration: very high，抗性击穿：非常高

9:sun deity's spear ligting 79+ damage 炎阳弓闪电 79+伤害 resistance penetration: medium，抗性击穿：中

10：sun deity spear arrow 416 damage 炎阳弓火箭 416 伤害 resistance penetration: fatal，抗性击穿：致命的

11:sundial 82+damage 晷环之辉 82+伤害 resistance penetration: medium，抗性击穿：中

12：时影箭 41+伤害 resistance penetration: neglegible，抗性击穿：可忽视

12：六芒星辉 67+伤害 resistance penetration: medium，抗性击穿：中

assuming all skill fired at 0 distance: fatal means difference from 5 strength level takes full damage

假设所有技能0距离发射,致命意味着在5级力量差距会导致吃满伤害


![Butterfly Sprite xiaohudie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88333c6610512f0c8efe5e9ad8852adaea04ef6f.jpeg)

In the classic Chinese animated series Calabash Brothers, Butterfly fairy xiaohudie “小蝴蝶” is a character that plays an important figure in the story and represents a kind-hearted fairy, She appears as a quiet and sweet-looking girl. She wears a pink dress with butterfly patterns, adorned with pink butterfly wing scales and yellow inner clothing. Her black hair has purple streaks and blue spots, with yellow flower-like markings near the ends. She has fair skin, large eyes with bright, deep green irises, and cherry red lips. On her head, she wears a light green crown-like accessory with two butterfly antennae, and near her ears, she has spherical decorations resembling pink ear covers (from a distance, they also resemble butterfly eyes). She has a slim figure, and unlike snake demon, who has a snake tail with no legs or feet, she has feet, and wears white socks and brownish-yellow shoes.
![ataeadff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0b0aa6c2cafc01aadea97672f221f3679313759.jpeg)
When she transforms into her original form, she becomes a beautiful large pink butterfly! with pink wings edged in black and decorated with white spots. assists the main characters, the Calabash Brothers; she was kidnapped by the evil Snake Demon and other enemies and forced to become their slave, but one day, Butterfly Sprite Xiaohudie accidentally stained Snake  Demon's treasure bag.

She also accidentally eat the divine elixir of the snake demon for unknown reason, most likely because of hunge. Thus she was reduced to jail for eternity, Her waist is constrained by a magic lock, which can be tightened by the incarceration of a snake demon to torture her, which gives her no way to escape from the control of the snake demon.![Butterfly Sprite xiaohudie image in this mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/45b4e4440070f30adf7af323b6d951d9136fbabd.jpeg)

but the Calabash Brothers luckily rescued her in their fight against the evil Snake Demon and other enemies; she added a sense of magic and mystery to the story. Her appearance is cute and exudes a mysterious charm, reflecting her kind and helpful nature in the series; during the battle, she uses her ability to distract the enemies and buy time for the Calabash Brothers, Butterfly fairy xiaohudie meets a tragic end. Unfortunately, to help the Calabash Brothers fight against the Snake Demon, she sacrifices due to the mouse demon's spear being stabbed into her heart; her sacrifice is filled with tragedy, highlighting her kind and selfless character. This ending adds emotional depth to the story, leaving a lasting impression on the audience of her bravery and dedication.
![Butterfly sprite xiaohudie's death](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2734dcd234dca1f07ddebd47983e741a69cfe411.jpeg)



Butterfly fairy Xiaohudie inscribed a deep memory in 00 generation of chinese audience, she is the most beloved charater in our childhood, Hope the people who like her can enjoy this mod.


小蝴蝶在中国00后观众心中留下了深刻的记忆，她是我们童年最喜爱的角色，希望喜欢她的人能够喜欢这个模组。


I recommend to add Orca's "onepiece" and "jujutukaisen" mod, all whitelist character are from those mods.

How to use this mod? first download the main jar file and dependency "yes-steve mode" and "geckolib", the after entering game press "aly+y" to bring four model file into the folder, then reenter world or enter "/ysm model reload" Butterfly Sprite Xiaohudie will hence appear


you can also find keys in setting in order to adjust the skills

Background story relevant to this mod
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/L-aKDFegeMc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
The story that happend on butterfly fairy in sequel:

In the aftermath of Calabash Brothers: Return of the Gourd King, the Butterfly Fairy did not truly perish. Instead, her soul was preserved and nourished by the radiant energies of the Seven-colored Peak, emanated from the combined spirits of the Calabash Brothers. She transcended her origins as a mere妖精(yáo jīng) and evolved into an independent being that bridges the gap between celestial and demonic realms.

Detailed Plot
Rebirth and Awakening

After her sacrifice, the Butterfly Fairy’s soul drifted aimlessly near the Seven-colored Peak, helpless but unwilling to fade away. Her spirit lingered, carried by the mountain breezes. The luminous energy left behind by the Calabash Brothers not only revitalized the land but also shielded her fragile essence. One fateful day, the Mountain God discovered her faint but tenacious spirit and was moved by her unyielding determination. He entrusted her soul to the celestial Weaver Girl.

The Weaver Girl, upon witnessing her resilient yet sorrowful soul, decided to remake the Butterfly Fairy. Using threads spun from the seven radiant colors of the Calabash Brothers, she wove together a new body for the Butterfly Fairy. The threads interwove妖族(yáo zú) agility with celestial purity, birthing a being of unmatched grace and latent power—the "Butterfly Spirit."

Awakening in her new form, the Butterfly Fairy found herself transformed. Her butterfly wings shimmered with celestial brilliance, and her aura radiated an otherworldly glow. Though her appearance remained that of the gentle girl she remembered, the immense power coursing through her felt foreign.

Struggles in the Heavenly Realm

Upon entering the Heavenly Realm, the Butterfly Fairy was captivated by its beauty yet felt constrained by its rigid rules. Her longing for freedom clashed with the strict codes of conduct upheld by the celestials. She was seen as an outsider due to her妖(yáo) heritage, facing prejudice and isolation.

Her internal struggle manifested in her inability to control her newfound powers, leading to an incident where her uncontrolled abilities nearly caused disaster. The celestials considered banishing her to the mortal realm as punishment. However, in her darkest hour, the spirits of the Calabash Brothers appeared to her in a dream. They spoke to her with warmth and encouragement:

“Butterfly Sister, true freedom lies not in escape, but in using your strength to protect what you hold dear.”

Their words reignited her will to persevere. From then on, she dedicated herself to mastering her powers, enduring countless trials, and slowly earning the respect of some celestials.

Breakthrough of Power

After centuries of rigorous training, the Butterfly Fairy awakened her "Butterfly Deity" bloodline, achieving a dramatic surge in strength. She shed her past frailty, becoming a figure of divine grace and unrivaled might.

Charging Attack: This skill symbolizes her liberation from past constraints. A single strike could shatter mountains and chains alike.

Heaven Strike: Harnessing celestial energy, she descends from the skies like a meteor, unleashing devastation upon her enemies.

Photon Blade: This luminous weapon blends妖灵(yáo líng) dexterity with divine sanctity, capable of cutting through the toughest defenses while radiating healing energy.

Through these transformations, she came to understand that power was not merely for destruction but for safeguarding the things she loved.

Return to the Fragrant Valley

Upon completing her celestial training, the Butterfly Fairy longed to return to the Fragrant Valley—the sanctuary of her happiest memories. However, she was heartbroken to find it desolate and barren. The vibrant flowers and lush greenery were gone, replaced by an expanse of lifeless soil. Tears welled in her eyes as she vowed to restore her beloved valley.

Using her newfound powers, she revitalized the land. Her wings stirred gentle breezes that carried seeds across the valley, and droplets of celestial dew nurtured the earth. Her Photon Blade carved the soil, allowing life to bloom anew. Gradually, the Fragrant Valley regained its vibrant beauty, filled with cascading flowers and the sweet scent of renewal.

One serene moonlit night, the Butterfly Fairy encountered the spirit of Calabash King in her dreams.

“Butterfly Sister, have you found your freedom?” he asked, his voice soft and warm.

The Butterfly Fairy smiled, her eyes glistening with gratitude. “Thank you, Big Brother. You taught me that true freedom lies not in escaping, but in the peace within one’s heart. I have found it at last.”

From that moment, she took up the mantle of "Butterfly Deity," dedicating herself to guarding the Fragrant Valley, ensuring it would remain a haven of beauty and peace for generations to come

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

中文介绍

小蝴蝶是中国剪纸动画片《葫芦小金刚》及其衍生作品中的女性角色，又称蝴蝶小妖精、由一只粉色蝴蝶化为人形。 本是青蛇大王的丫鬟， [被青蛇精利用来迷惑葫芦小金刚， 但喜欢上小金刚后变成了所谓的善良妖精。 

其性格不仅友善温柔，并且重视友情又讲义气，对葫芦小金刚有着崇拜与期待之心， 但曾经为了得到自由，不得不听命于青蛇大王，虽暗助青蛇精使蝙蝠妖偷走葫芦小金刚的吊坠， 但始终没有对小金刚下毒手

曾偷吃青蛇精的仙丹、弄脏青蛇精的百宝锦囊，而被其关押在牢洞内，长久不见天日，并被强行箍上枷锁，腰间被套上青蛇精的法宝魔爪金箍，此物越劈越紧，只有青蛇精可以松开。这导致葫芦小金刚虽然拯救了她行动上的沦陷，但却一直没让小蝴蝶彻底挣脱腰上这副枷锁的束缚。 虽然肉体没能恢复完全的自由，但仍留有变回蝴蝶而飞翔的本能后来还是被青蛇精利用，以恢复自由为诱饵， 因不得已而泄露了小金刚的弱点， 而导致对方被青蛇精夺走法宝而囚禁地牢，好在小蝴蝶奋力协助葫芦小金刚重获吊坠； 就在准备逃亡时，小蝴蝶不幸被青蛇精手下的小妖用飞枪刺中而亡，在临死前向小金刚坦白了自己的心迹，并告知其打败青蛇精的秘密。

这个模组假设蝴蝶仙子小蝴蝶在被长矛穿透后并没有死亡。她曾服用过一种灵丹，这种灵丹的作用类似于不死图腾，还赋予了她巨大的力量，远远超过蛇妖的效果，强大百倍。很可能是蝴蝶仙子小蝴蝶的体质与灵丹的制造过程相契合，几年后她在被遗弃的洞穴中苏醒（在原故事中蛇妖已被全部消灭），灵丹的效果赋予了她巨大的能量和超乎想象的身体能力，远超原故事中的设定。她还为了保护自己，开发了一种个人的物理防御技能。虽然《葫芦兄弟》的故事已经结束，但小蝴蝶的新冒险即将开始。



续集关于小蝴蝶的背景故事

小蝴蝶在牺牲后，她的灵魂漂泊于七彩峰附近，无助却不愿消散，始终追随着七彩峰的微风。葫芦兄弟牺牲后化作的七彩灵气不仅滋养了大地，也保护了她的灵魂。某一天，山神偶然发现了她微弱但执着的灵魂光辉，惊叹于她顽强的意志，便将她托付给天庭织女。

织女看到这颗灵魂，感受到她承受的痛苦和不屈的精神，于是决定以七彩丝线为媒介，将小蝴蝶重新塑造为一个全新的生命体。织女用丝线将她的灵魂细细缠绕，织入了妖族的灵动与天界的光辉，最终创造出一个拥有天界力量与妖族本能的新生命体——“蝶灵”。

小蝴蝶在重生后，发现自己既拥有蝴蝶的翅膀，又被赋予了一种超然的神秘力量。她的外形仍然是她所熟悉的少女模样，但散发出的光辉却让她感到陌生。

初入天庭的挣扎

小蝴蝶初入天庭时，充满了对自由的向往。然而，天庭的规矩让她感到无比压抑：仙人们奉行严格的秩序，要求她必须服从天庭的规则，不得擅自行动。

她因内心对自由的追求而多次触犯天规，被其他仙人排斥。她的妖族血统也成为许多仙人冷落她的原因。即便如此，她依然怀抱希望，坚持探索自己的能力。

在一次任务中，她因为力量失控，险些造成灾难，天庭甚至考虑将她贬下凡间。就在她几乎绝望时，葫芦兄弟的灵魂通过梦境出现。他们告诉她：“蝴蝶妹妹，真正的自由，不是逃避，而是用你的力量保护你想守护的一切。”

这句话让小蝴蝶重拾信心。她开始认真学习如何掌控自己的力量，并在考验中逐渐展现出自己的潜力。

力量的突破

经过数百年的修炼，小蝴蝶觉醒了“蝶神”的血脉。她的力量得到了质的飞跃，彻底摆脱了昔日的弱小形象。



随着力量的觉醒，小蝴蝶也明白，力量的真正意义不是为了征服，而是为了守护。

回归奇香谷

在天庭中完成修炼的小蝴蝶，决定回到她最爱的奇香谷。她发现这里已经成为一片荒芜之地，曾经的花海早已消失殆尽。小蝴蝶流下了眼泪，她开始用自己的力量复苏这片土地。

她的翅膀轻轻扇动，带来了缤纷的花种与清新的甘露。她的光刀划过大地，种下新的生命。最终，奇香谷再一次被五彩斑斓的花海覆盖，散发出令人沉醉的香气。

在一个月夜，小蝴蝶在梦境中与葫芦小金刚的灵魂重逢。

“蝴蝶妹妹，你找到了属于自己的自由了吗？”小金刚微笑着问。

小蝴蝶轻轻点头：“小哥哥，谢谢你教会我，真正的自由，不是逃离，而是内心的平静。现在，我终于明白了。”

从此，小蝴蝶成为奇香谷的守护神。她以“蝶神”之名守护着这片她曾深爱的土地，为后人传颂。
